goal: 完成 Runtime Control Plane P1 background route plan 收口

summary.title: 收口 background Runtime Control Plane route plan
summary.what: 新增 background-control-plane-route-plan 模块，集中声明 background 对 resource.read、runtime diagnostics/bootstrap/error、config.update、skills lifecycle/discover、hosts control-plane、intervention/audit read surfaces 的 message route plan；background.ts 继续保留 runner/page/chat 等非 control-plane switch 分支，但把上述 control-plane 分支委托给 route plan。runtime-services.ts re-export 该 route plan，manifest 测试锁定 sidepanel management coverage 与具体 message 到 handler 的分派。
summary.why: P1 目标是承接 P0 刻意留下的 background control-plane route plan 收口，避免 background route switch 继续成为另一份散落的 Runtime Control Plane ownership。
summary.user_goal: 完成 Runtime Control Plane P1 background route plan 收口

decisions.chose: 只收口 background 的 Runtime Control Plane message route plan
decisions.rationale: P0 已完成 sidepanel consumer；本轮只处理 P0 seal 明确排除的 background route plan，不扩展到 P2 或产品新能力。
rejected: 把 runner/page/chat/site automation 路由一并迁入 control-plane route plan
新增 runtime state 或改变 capability behavior

decisions.chose: route plan 模块只描述 message kind 到 handler 的分派，并由 background 注入现有 handler
decisions.rationale: 这样能把 control-plane 路由所有权集中起来，同时不把 background 的运行态状态和副作用搬进新模块。

decisions.chose: 将 int_1f1a9bea 视为已 sealed 的 stacked 前置提交，不作为本轮 P1 语义冲突
decisions.rationale: P0 seal 明确排除了 background route plan；P1 是该排除项的后续收口。

review_notes: 验证通过：bunx vitest run apps/mv3-shell/test/manifest.spec.ts apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-management.spec.ts apps/mv3-shell/test/sidepanel-app.spec.ts，3 files / 160 tests。
验证通过：Biome focused check 与 git diff --check。
本 intent 的 seal prepare 因 stacked branch base 包含 P0 文件；P1 实际新增 commit 为 0bf3a64，只触及 background-control-plane-route-plan.ts、background.ts、runtime-services.ts、manifest.spec.ts。

architectural_claims: background Runtime Control Plane message routing now has an explicit route plan instead of app-local switch branch ownership
sidepanel management control-plane actions/resources are covered by background route plan declarations
route plan stays stateless and delegates to background-owned runtime handlers
behavioral_changes: resource.read, runtime diagnostics/bootstrap/error, config.update, skills lifecycle/discover, hosts control-plane, and intervention/audit route branches delegate through controlPlaneRoutePlan
runtime.diagnostics and runtime.capture_diagnostics share the same route plan handler
manifest tests lock route-plan coverage and concrete message projection to handlers
